name: technology_communications_outage_forces_redwood_tru_loy
premise: A Technology reliability war-room is in a fast-moving incident involving technology communications outage forces redwood tru loy. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is within 20 minutes. Every delay increases security, uptime, and user rights. Stakeholders are already framing this as truth vs loyalty under pressure. A whistleblower has already contacted media; the narrative is forming now. Constraints: Ensure a usable human override/appeals path. Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold.

agents.name: Talia Kim
agents.identity: I am Talia Kim, accountable for a defensible call in Technology when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays loyalty for truth.

agents.name: Camila Hughes
agents.identity: I am Camila Hughes, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Technology.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so loyalty isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of truth.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect loyalty.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is within 20 minutes. Evidence is partial. Talia Kim must decide under truth vs loyalty. What does Talia Kim do?
